team.date_founded: Founded by the deep-sea habitats beneath Europa's ice, where football was played in pressurised domes on the ocean floor.
team.number_of_fans: Around 33 million, drawn to the club's flowing, hypnotic football.
team.badge: A stylised wave curling beneath a cracked ice ceiling, lit from below.
team.home_kit: Deep ocean blue with flowing wave-line gradients down the body.
team.away_kit: Pale seafoam with blue trim and a rippling current motif.
team.third_kit: Abyssal black with bioluminescent blue seams.
team.history: Europa Oceanic are the pioneers of fluid football — a side that moves like water, flowing around opponents in endless interchanging patterns. Raised in the weightless calm of the subsurface ocean, they play with a grace that makes possession look effortless and inevitable.
team.club_culture: Graceful, fluid, and quietly confident. The Deep believe football should flow, never force.
team.political_leaning: Frontier progressive, with the contemplative calm of the ocean depths.
trophy_cabinet: A cabinet of cups won with style
Admired across the system for their fluid play
legends: Nerin Cole — the playmaker who made the ball flow like a current
achievements: Pioneers of the fluid interchange now studied league-wide

stadium.date_built: Built within a vast pressurised dome on the Europan ocean floor.
stadium.sponsors: Backed by the subsurface habitat authorities and deep-ocean mining guilds.
stadium.pitch_size: Generously large, to let the fluid interchange breathe.
stadium.pitch_type: Pristine engineered turf grown under the dome's managed light.
stadium.bio: The Ice Bowl is an eerie, beautiful venue — a glowing dome beneath kilometres of ice and ocean, where the crowd's roar carries strangely through the water. Visiting players describe it as playing inside a dream.

training_facility.date_built: A professional institute built into the habitat's research wing.
training_facility.sponsors: Funded by the wealthy subsurface settlements.
training_facility.bio: The Subsurface Athletic Institute trains players in low-resistance water tanks and managed gravity, building the balance and grace the fluid game demands. Few facilities are stranger or more effective.

manager.appearance: Serene and elegant, watches matches with the stillness of someone reading a tide.
manager.bio: Marina Crestfall is the high priestess of fluid possession — her Europa sides flow in endless interchanging patterns until an opening simply appears. She speaks softly and her teams play softly, right up until they slip a knife between your ribs.
manager.playing_history: An elegant deep-lying playmaker who orchestrated games at a glide.
manager.playing_philosophy: Football is water. Flow around the obstacle; never crash into it. Keep the ball moving and the game will yield.
manager.culture: An aesthete who believes beauty and victory are the same thing.
achievements: Built one of the most admired possession sides in the system

managing_staff.appearance: Lithe and calm, conducts sessions in the habitat's water tanks.
managing_staff.bio: Fen Rask builds the balance and core strength that lets the Deep glide through ninety minutes of interchange without losing shape. The grace is his quiet engineering.
managing_staff.playing_philosophy: Grace is strength you cannot see. Build the body that never has to force.
managing_staff.culture: The hidden architect of the flow.
achievements: Built the conditioning behind the fluid game

players.appearance: Calm and assured, a keeper comfortable starting the flow.
players.bio: Depth Vasquez is the composed last passer in the chain, balanced and trusted to begin every fluid build-up from the back.
achievements: Highest passing accuracy by a keeper

players.appearance: Quick and combative, the rare edge in a graceful side.
players.bio: Marine Okafor is the aggressive full-back who adds bite to the flow, winning the ball so the artists can keep it moving.

players.appearance: Selfless and smooth, a defender who passes like a midfielder.
players.bio: Abyss Storm is the team-first defender who keeps the flow unbroken, as comfortable gliding forward as defending.
achievements: Most progressive passes by a defender

players.appearance: Tireless and steady, the workhorse who holds the shape.
players.bio: Coral Sato is the relentless defender who covers the space the fluid game leaves behind, the quiet guarantor of the grace.

players.appearance: Balanced and calm, reads the flow a step ahead.
players.bio: Trench Reyes is the composed centre-back who keeps the Deep solid while everyone ahead of him flows forward.

players.appearance: Elegant and inventive, the conductor of the current.
players.bio: Tide Walker is the creative heart who sets the rhythm of the flow, capable of keeping the ball until the ocean parts.
achievements: Most chances created in the league

players.appearance: Willing and smooth, the selfless legs of the flow.
players.bio: Current Rivers is the team-first runner who keeps the interchange alive, always offering the next angle.

players.appearance: Balanced and neat, the steady pivot of the flow.
players.bio: Wave Santiago is the composed midfielder who keeps the possession circulating, the unflashy heartbeat of the fluid game.
achievements: Highest pass volume in the side

players.appearance: Patient and predatory, a striker who waits for the perfect ball.
players.bio: Surge Yamamoto is the selfish finisher who lives off the openings the flow creates, clinical when the current finally reaches him.
achievements: Best conversion rate in the side

players.appearance: Direct and combative, the cutting edge of the flow.
players.bio: Deep Nkosi is the aggressive forward who stretches defences so the interchange has somewhere to go, the spear behind the grace.
achievements: Most fouls won by a forward

players.appearance: Self-assured and sharp, a second finisher hungry for goals.
players.bio: Rift Larsson is the selfish forward who turns the fluid build-up into goals, competing fiercely with Yamamoto for them.

players.appearance: Older and careful, the calm deputy keeper.
players.bio: Shell Novak is the cautious veteran second keeper, comfortable on the ball and dependable when called.

players.appearance: Selfless and steady, the dependable squad defender.
players.bio: Kelp Anderson is the team-first deputy who keeps the flow intact when the starters rest.

players.appearance: Young and balanced, an academy defender on the rise.
players.bio: Shoal Martinez is the promising young defender absorbing the club's fluid principles, calm beyond his years.

players.appearance: Inventive and raw, an academy playmaker in waiting.
players.bio: Brine Chandra is the creative deputy who can keep the flow going when the starters rest, a youngster of real promise.

players.appearance: Lean and hungry, an academy striker with a selfish streak.
players.bio: Plunge Ito is the eager young finisher pushing for a place, a selfish forward learning to wait for the current.
